decisions.rationale: Observation's source_id 120418_brt_cb4_34th_street is already listed in the registry record corridor_34th-st-busway source_ids, and the alias corridor_34th-st-manhattan-2012-04-18 confirms the match. The observation resolves to its own base_record_id; no different registry record matches better. The limits difference (Twelfth–First vs Ninth–Third) reflects study-area scope vs busway segment, not a distinct entity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The street is highlighted in yellow from Twelfth Ave to Lexington Ave, and in red from Lexington Ave to First Ave
